title: crotalaria obscura
intro: Crotalaria obscura, also known as the 'Ashtavarga' or 'Eight-Herb' plant, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria obscura include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include making teas, infusions, and powders from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments.
